changelog: Rebuilt UI from scratch on the BUPA design system (Plus Jakarta Sans, 8px grid, Lucide icons)
No CDN dependencies: fonts and icons ship with the resource
Fixed a hardcoded resource-name check that disabled the script when the folder was renamed
Job list now shows the active job, grade, salary and a duty toggle in one card
Confirmation sheet before removing a job
Empty state when no jobs are saved
Automatic job icons (police, EMS, mechanic, taxi, trucker and more)
Console version checker and news system
